Description: K.O.N.G. - Kingdom Of Nocturnal Gorillas, is originally based on StoneMason's San Bruno Primate Shelter. CD2 v18+, MEV, DEA, EEE, YoMAMA required. CustomCD2SFXv2 or newer is recommended but not needed to run the difficulty.

Messages.Message: MOMENTUM PEAKED! Health Regen capped at 35%!
Momentum lost... Health Regen decayed to 10%.

Idk why people don't use unstoppable, it's easily THE most underrated perk. It works against spiderwebs, environmental goo, snow blizzards, electrocrystals, sandstorms, earthquakes, stun from slashers, stun from jellies, stun from stalker, spit from web spitters, goo by goobers, frozen particles by snowy praets...
Run your pockets FOOL, I want the GREEN STUFF!!

Name: KONG - B11
